"'''The First to Strike'''" is the fifth adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign for [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook|Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition]]. It is written by [[Owen K.C. Stephens]] and was released on [[June 13]], [[2008]].

==Plot summary==
The players use information gained from the [[Almas Academy]] to help free [[Nizon]] from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation.
